questions.question: What is the Vietnamese meaning of the word "link"?
What is the Vietnamese meaning of the word "relate"?
What is the Vietnamese meaning of the word "whom"?
What is the Vietnamese meaning of the word "structure"?
What is the Vietnamese meaning of the word "relative"?
What is the Vietnamese meaning of the word "clause"?
What is the Vietnamese meaning of the word "who"?
What is the Vietnamese meaning of the word "which"?
What is the Vietnamese meaning of the word "that"?
What is the Vietnamese meaning of the word "where"?
What is the Vietnamese meaning of the word "whose"?
What is the Vietnamese meaning of the word "define"?
Choose the best word: This sentence has two _____s.
questions.explanation: Câu hoàn chỉnh: "This sentence has two clauses." — từ đúng là "clause" (mệnh đề).

questions.question: Choose the best word: The man _____ called is my uncle.
questions.explanation: Câu hoàn chỉnh: "The man who called is my uncle." — từ đúng là "who" (người mà).

questions.question: Choose the best word: The book _____ I read was good.
questions.explanation: Câu hoàn chỉnh: "The book which I read was good." — từ đúng là "which" (cái mà).

questions.question: Choose the best word: The car _____ he bought is red.
questions.explanation: Câu hoàn chỉnh: "The car that he bought is red." — từ đúng là "that" (mà).

questions.question: Choose the best word: This is the house _____ I grew up.
questions.explanation: Câu hoàn chỉnh: "This is the house where I grew up." — từ đúng là "where" (nơi mà).

questions.question: Choose the best word: The boy _____ dog is lost is sad.
questions.explanation: Câu hoàn chỉnh: "The boy whose dog is lost is sad." — từ đúng là "whose" (của ai).

questions.question: Choose the best word: A defining clause _____s the noun.
questions.explanation: Câu hoàn chỉnh: "A defining clause defines the noun." — từ đúng là "define" (xác định).

questions.question: Choose the best word: The clause _____s the person.
questions.explanation: Câu hoàn chỉnh: "The clause describes the person." — từ đúng là "describe" (miêu tả).

questions.question: Choose the best word: Relative pronouns _____ ideas.
questions.explanation: Câu hoàn chỉnh: "Relative pronouns connect ideas." — từ đúng là "connect" (kết nối).

questions.question: Choose the best word: This is a _____ sentence.
questions.explanation: Câu hoàn chỉnh: "This is a complex sentence." — từ đúng là "complex" (phức tạp).

questions.question: Choose the best word: The clause gives extra _____.
questions.explanation: Câu hoàn chỉnh: "The clause gives extra information." — từ đúng là "information" (thông tin).

questions.question: Choose the best word: This information is _____.
questions.explanation: Câu hoàn chỉnh: "This information is essential." — từ đúng là "essential" (thiết yếu).

questions.question: Complete the sentence: The man ___ called is my uncle.
Complete the sentence: The book ___ I read was good.
Complete the sentence: This is the house ___ I was born.
Complete the sentence: The boy ___ dog is lost is crying.
Complete the sentence: The car ___ he bought is red.
Complete the sentence: The woman ___ I met is a doctor.
questions.explanation: 'Whom' is the object pronoun for people.

questions.question: Complete the sentence: The city ___ we visited was lovely.
questions.explanation: 'Which' refers to a thing/place as object.

questions.question: Complete the sentence: People ___ exercise are healthier.
Complete the sentence: The shop ___ sells books is closed.
questions.explanation: 'Which' refers to a thing as subject.

questions.question: Complete the sentence: The day ___ we met was sunny.
Which English word means "liên kết"?
Which English word means "liên quan"?
Which English word means "người mà (tân ngữ)"?
questions.explanation: "người mà (tân ngữ)" trong tiếng Anh là "whom".

questions.question: Which English word means "cấu trúc"?
Which English word means "quan hệ"?
Which English word means "mệnh đề"?
